name: Federalist Papers
description: Hamilton vs. Madison vs. Jay. 74 papers with known authorship, 12 disputed papers (scholarly consensus: Madison). The foundational stylometry problem.

name: Shakespeare vs. Contemporaries
description: Shakespeare, Marlowe, and Jonson. 8 plays with known authorship, 4 held out (including the disputed Henry VIII).

name: Brontë Sisters
description: Charlotte, Emily, and Anne Brontë. 26 chapter excerpts with known authorship, 6 held out for attribution. Similar upbringing and genre but distinct styles.

name: The Homeric Question
description: Iliad vs. Odyssey (Butler translation), split by book. 43 books with known attribution, 6 held out. Tests whether the same author composed both epics — also suitable for authorship diarization research.

name: Pauline Epistles
description: Paul vs. Pastoral author (KJV). 8 letters with known attribution (undisputed Paul + pastoral), 3 genuinely disputed letters (Ephesians, Colossians, 2 Thessalonians).

name: Russian Literature
description: Dostoevsky, Tolstoy, Chekhov, and Turgenev in English translation. 27 chapter excerpts with known authorship, 4 held out for attribution.

name: State of the Union Addresses
description: Lincoln, T. Roosevelt, and Wilson. 7 addresses with known authorship, 3 held out for attribution.
